2606.29445.title: Bridging VideoQA and Video-Guided Agentic Tasks via Generalized Keyframe Extraction
2606.29445.paper_summary: Video understanding is a fundamental capability for multimodal intelligence, and recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable performance on Video Question Answering (VideoQA) benchmarks. However, existing benchmarks primarily evaluate whether models can perceive shallow visual cues, while rarely examining whether MLLMs can learn deeper knowledge or procedural skills from video tutorials and generalize them to downstream long-horizon agentic tasks. To address this gap, we introduce VG-GUIBench (Video-Guided GUI Benchmark), a new benchmark designed to evaluate whether MLLM-based GUI agents can follow video tutorials to complete corresponding GUI interactive tasks. Furthermore, we observe that the performance of models on both VideoQA and video-guided agentic tasks critically depends on effective keyframe extraction. Based on this observation, we propose TASKER (Task-driven And Scene-aware Keyframe searchER), a keyframe extraction algorithm that jointly considers task relevance and scene dynamics to identify informative frames. Experimental results demonstrate that TASKER achieves significant performance improvements on both VideoQA and video-guided agentic task benchmarks, outperforming the best baseline by 2.0% on the EgoSchema fullset and 1.8% on the NExT-QA dataset, respectively. These results further highlight the potential of generalized keyframe extraction methods for video understanding tasks. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/VG-GUI-TASKER/VG-GUI-TASKER.
2606.29445.paper_summary_zh: 視頻理解是多模態智能的一項基本能力，最近的多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）在視頻問答（VideoQA）基準上取得了顯著的表現。<lb/>然而，現有的基準主要評估模型是否能感知淺層的視覺線索，而很少檢查MLLMs是否能從視頻教程中學習更深層的知識或程序技能，並將其泛化到下游的長期代理任務。<lb/>為了解決這一差距，我們引入了VG-GUIBench（視頻引導的GUI基準），這是一個新的基準，旨在評估基於MLLM的GUI代理是否能遵循視頻教程來完成相應的GUI互動任務。<lb/>此外，我們觀察到模型在視頻問答和視頻引導的代理任務上的表現，嚴重依賴於有效的關鍵幀提取。<lb/>基於這一觀察，我們提出了TASKER（任務驅動和場景感知的關鍵幀搜索器），這是一種關鍵幀提取算法，聯合考慮任務相關性和場景動態，以識別信息豐富的幀。<lb/>實驗結果表明，TASKER在視頻問答和視頻引導的代理任務基準上實現了顯著的性能提升，分別在EgoSchema全套上超越最佳基準2.0%，在NExT-QA數據集上超越1.8%。<lb/>這些結果進一步突顯了廣義關鍵幀提取方法在視頻理解任務中的潛力。<lb/>我們的代碼和數據可在https://github.com/VG-GUI-TASKER/VG-GUI-TASKER獲得。
2606.29445.author: Sunqi Fan et.al.
2606.29445.authors: Sunqi Fan, Qingle Liu, Runqi Yin, Meng-Hao Guo, Shuojin Yang
